{{Quote|The Rebels are doomed to quick defeat, then death or slavery!|Heliesk|<ref name="Darklighter2" />}}
'''Heliesk''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] who commanded the [[Rand Ecliptic/Legends|''Rand Ecliptic'']] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], with [[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs Darklighter]] and [[Derek Klivian/Legends|Derek Klivian]] as his executive officers.

==Biography==
A [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Heliesk commanded the [[Imperial II-class frigate|''Imperial II''-class frigate]] [[Rand Ecliptic/Legends|''Rand Ecliptic'']] on its first posting early in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="Darklighter2" /> Recent [[Imperial Naval Academy/Legends|Imperial Naval Academy]] graduates [[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs Darklighter]] and [[Derek Klivian/Legends|Derek "Hobbie" Klivian]] served under him as the [[Frigate/Legends|frigate's]] [[First Mate/Legends|first]] and [[Second mate/Legends|second mate]].<ref name="Darklighter1">[[Empire 8|''Empire'' 8]]</ref>

Although Heliesk was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] sympathizer and agent under the codename Starfire,<ref name="CSWE" /> he maintained his cover as a staunch Imperial, dismissing the Rebellion as absurd and doomed to failure.<ref name="Darklighter2" />

On a routine sector patrol, the ''Rand Ecliptic'' encountered the ''[[Lark]]'', a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] belonging to the [[Camblian Order]] of [[Eedoq]], carrying 309 young people to the [[Clarion Scholars Academy]] on [[Daemen]]. Failing to provide proper Imperial identification, Captain Heliesk sent the [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] of [[Twilight Squadron (Imperial)|Twilight Squadron]] to disable or destroy the ''Lark'', claiming it to be a suspected Rebel ship. Although [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] leader Darklighter ordered the ship to be safely disabled, it was destroyed by [[Tars Nandy]]. Contrary to Darklighter's protestations, Heliesk welcomed the incident, stating that it would save days of prisoner interrogations.<ref name="Darklighter2" />

This apparent disregard for life sickened Darklighter, and incited him to [[Mutiny on the Rand Ecliptic/Legends|mutiny aboard the ''Rand Ecliptic'']] with one of the ship's rebel cells.<ref name="Darklighter2" /> During the mutiny, three other cells were revealed, one of which was led by Klivian, who took command of the frigate. Heliesk locked himself in his quarters, but was soon captured for his knowledge of Imperial communications codes and made a prisoner of war.<ref name="Darklighter3">[[Empire 12|''Empire'' 12]]</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
As depicted by ''[[Star Wars: Empire: Darklighter]]'', the events of the mutiny on the ''Rand Ecliptic'', and Heliesk's involvement in them, presented in this article differ from the account given by Hobbie Klivian in the short story [[Mutiny on the Rand Ecliptic (short story)|"Mutiny on the Rand Ecliptic"]].<ref name="Darklighter2" /> According to "Mutiny on the Rand Ecliptic", Heliesk was a willing but covert participant in the defection of Klivian and Darklighter. As "Starfire", Heliesk was the Rebel contact of [[Lindy]], a friend of Hobbie's with whom the defectors intended to jump ship while the ''Rand Ecliptic'' delivered [[rubindum]] ore to the [[Bestine system/Legends|Bestine system]]. In an effort to provide the Rebel Alliance with the rubindum without exposing his allegiance to the Empire, Heliesk led a [[Squad/Legends|squad]] of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] to Lindy's rebels' and the defectors' rendezvous, bringing the rebels aboard the ''Rand Ecliptic'' and giving Klivian a [[Code cylinder/Legends|rank cylinder]] serving as a key to the ship's captain's quarters. There, Heliesk instructed Klivian and Darklighter to stage a mutiny with the rebels as their crew, delivering the ship and its cargo to the Alliance without breaking his Imperial cover.<ref name="GG3">{{WEGCite|story=Mutiny on the Rand Ecliptic (short story)|book=Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back|stext=Mutiny on the ''Rand Ecliptic''|reprint=1}}</ref>
